title: I'm Yours
album: We Sing. We Dance. We Steal Things.
why_this_song: I'm Yours by Jason Mraz (2008) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "It cannot wait, I'm yours"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "And it's our Godforsaken right to be loved, loved, loved, loved, loved"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Well, open up your mind and see like me"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Well, you done, done me in, you bet I felt it"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Well, you done, done me in, you bet I felt it"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Well, open up your mind and see like me

Look into your heart, and you'll find that the sky is yours

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "yours" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "yours" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "loved" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "loved" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I fell right through the cracks
So I won't hesitate, no more, no more
It's what we aim to do

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Now I'm trying to get back
Open up your plans and, damn, you're free

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "I'm Yours" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "I'm Yours" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "I'm Yours" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "I'm Yours"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Jason Mraz one question about "I'm Yours", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Jason Mraz sobre "I'm Yours", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
